title: Assertion failure in rel_bin.c for MERGE INTO command
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE ProductTarget (ProductID UInt64, Name String NOT NULL, ProductNumber Int64, Color String NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE ProductSource (ProductID UInt64, Name String NOT NULL, ProductNumber Int64, Color String NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO ProductSource (Name, ProductNumber, Color) VALUES ('Widget', 1001, 'Red');
INSERT INTO ProductTarget (Name, ProductNumber, Color) VALUES ('Gadget', NULL, 'Blue');

INSERT INTO ProductTarget (ProductID, Name, ProductNumber, Color) SELECT ProductID, Name, ProductNumber, COALESCE(Color, 'Unknown') FROM ProductSource WHERE ProductID IN (SELECT ProductID FROM ProductTarget);
key_bug_features: Assertion failure during MERGE INTO command execution
